description: User-level configuration for pie mode. Stored at ~/.pi/a_la_mode/.config.json

schema_version.description: Schema version using MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH semver. Same versioning rules as mode config.json.

file_embedding_size_limit.description: Maximum file size for inline embedding. Files exceeding this fall back to path substitution. Accepts human-readable sizes: B (bytes), KB (kilobytes), MB (megabytes).

gc_stale_age_days.description: Number of days before lazy garbage collection considers cache and approval entries stale.
